mapper.insert: insert into inventory_stock_sync_policy( policy_key, seller_id, scope_type, warehouse_key, warehouse_name, spu_id, sku_id, stock_id, sync_mode, enabled, version, last_apply_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{policyKey}, #{sellerId}, #{scopeType}, coalesce(#{warehouseKey}, ''), coalesce(#{warehouseName}, ''), #{spuId}, #{skuId}, #{stockId}, #{syncMode}, 'Y', 0, sysdate(), #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), coalesce(#{remark}, '') ) on duplicate key update seller_id = values(seller_id), scope_type = values(scope_type), warehouse_key = values(warehouse_key), warehouse_name = values(warehouse_name), spu_id = values(spu_id), sku_id = values(sku_id), stock_id = values(stock_id), sync_mode = values(sync_mode), enabled = 'Y', version = version + 1, last_apply_time = sysdate(), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = sysdate(), remark = values(remark)
mapper.select: select * from inventory_stock_sync_policy where policy_key = #{policyKey} and enabled = 'Y'

select distinct p.* from inventory_stock_sync_policy p where p.enabled = 'Y' and exists ( select 1 from inventory_sku_warehouse_stock st where st.spu_id = #{spuId} and st.seller_id = p.seller_id ) order by p.seller_id asc, p.scope_type asc, p.policy_id asc
